testCases.title: Verify navigation to Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify searching for a hockey team
steps: Verification: Expect search results to display for 'Bruins'

testCases.title: Verify navigating to page 5 using pagination
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=5'

testCases.title: Verify navigating to the next page using the 'Next' button in pagination
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=23'
expected: Pagination navigates correctly to the next page

testCases.title: Verify navigating to the previous page using the 'Previous' button in pagination
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=21'
expected: Pagination navigates correctly to the previous page
